title: anisantha diandra
intro: Anisantha diandra, also known as sandbur or grassbur, is a type of annual grass native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Anisantha diandra include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Anisantha diandra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
